description: Maps published methods to Blue Hen RE adoption status. Prevents reinventing SOTA; guides frontier synthesis. Normative with SCIENCE_REVIEW.md.

statusLegend.watchlist: Monitor — may adopt after BD gate
statusLegend.baseline_only: Commercial/open baseline — compare, do not re-implement
statusLegend.rejected: Measured and rejected for our use case
statusLegend.inspiration_only: Biological or theoretical inspiration — not a product claim

entries.title: Matryoshka Representation Learning
entries.doNotReinvent: Train nested prefix losses; truncation without MRL training fails at t=8 (EVIDENCE §3.7 Family B)
entries.frontierNote: Combine with Barlow/InfoNCE domain tune — our edge story is MRL + quant, not surgery.

entries.title: Contrastive Learning (InfoNCE / SimCLR)
entries.authors: van den Oord; Chen et al.
entries.ourComponent: Default loss in train_loop; domain fine-tune beats zero-shot BGE 4/4 tenants
entries.doNotReinvent: Standard baseline — product is org-adapted small models, not InfoNCE novelty
entries.frontierNote: Keep as anchor; stack Barlow or VICReg only where measured.

entries.title: Barlow Twins
entries.ourComponent: Wave 2 TPE leader (robust_score 1.486 synthetic); real-text bake-off pending
entries.doNotReinvent: Published SSL method — our contribution is domain org recipe + edge serving stack
entries.frontierNote: Promote to default recipe only if real-text ΔnDCG ≥ 0.005 vs InfoNCE on research-rag corpus.

entries.title: VICReg
entries.ourComponent: Collapse-prone synthetic regimes only; neutral on real text
entries.doNotReinvent: Use as regime-specific regularizer, not fleet default
entries.frontierNote: Pair with SimSiam-style invariance collapse tests — not general retrieval win.

entries.title: Understanding Dimensional Collapse in Contrastive SSL
entries.ourComponent: Problem framing; effective rank diagnostic in eval-harness
entries.doNotReinvent: Motivation is settled — focus on measured fixes, not re-deriving collapse theory

entries.title: RankMe (unsupervised rank predictor)
entries.ourComponent: erank() in asn-engine; deploy gate diagnostic
entries.doNotReinvent: Use as metric; ASN surgery failed to improve rank on fleet (0/4)

entries.title: LoRA / PEFT
entries.ourComponent: peft: true in DEFAULT_RECIPE; Conductor cost control
entries.doNotReinvent: Standard — use open bases (MiniLM, BGE-small, Qwen3-Embed-0.6B)
entries.frontierNote: Edge product = PEFT on 0.6B-class backbones, not full fine-tune 7B+.

entries.title: Qwen3-Embedding (open small embedder)
entries.ourComponent: Listed baseline in HANDOFF §3; not yet in eval-public panel
entries.doNotReinvent: Use as backbone candidate — do not claim ASN superiority without fair ablation
entries.frontierNote: Next backbone sweep: Qwen3-Embed-0.6B + Barlow/MRL vs MiniLM.

entries.title: BGE-M3 / bge-small
entries.doNotReinvent: Zero-shot SOTA reference — beat via domain adapt, not re-architecting BGE

entries.title: ASN three-tier spectral surgery (internal)
entries.ourComponent: asn-engine spectral.py — disabled in production recipes
entries.doNotReinvent: Do not re-litigate without new collapse-regime evidence (engine_proof.py)
entries.frontierNote: Biology-inspired framing stays inspiration-only per SCIENCE_REVIEW.

entries.title: Quantization Aware Matryoshka Adaptation (QAMA)
entries.ourComponent: int8 tier exists; QAMA trains quant-friendly nested dims jointly
entries.doNotReinvent: If adopting, cite and ablate vs our post-hoc int8 — may beat naive truncate+quant
entries.frontierNote: Strong candidate for Phase 1 edge tier upgrade after Barlow real-text gate.

entries.title: Projection head as info bottleneck (SimCLR/BYOL line)
entries.authors: Chen et al.; Grill et al.
entries.ourComponent: Discardable g_φ in ASN train_loop; served z = f_θ(x) only

entries.title: Synaptic Homeostasis Hypothesis (SHY)
entries.doNotReinvent: Never claim mathematical equivalence biology ⇄ ML

entries.title: RTF / SDE spectral fusion (multimodal)
entries.doNotReinvent: Multimodal rank fusion is a Phase B+ research track, not current reinvention risk
entries.frontierNote: Revisit when finance-lab or multimodal org is scoped.

synthesisTarget.name: Blue Hen Frontier Embed Stack v1
synthesisTarget.tagline: Domain-adapted open backbone + measured loss mix + MRL/int8 edge — no unreplicated surgery claims

layers.choice: InfoNCE + optional Barlow (if real-text wins) + MRL prefix losses
Effective rank monitor + VICReg only in collapse regimes; surgery OFF
Full dim for quality; t=8..64 MRL + int8 for edge/home
Tenant nDCG + commercial panel + slasso exams — not MTEB overclaim
